theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The brand has a 35-year legacy of bespoke travel. An Organic & Earthy archetype conveys trust, warmth, and heritage. It avoids the clinical feel of tech sites and positions the brand as a high-end, immersive travel curator similar to Pelorus or The Outpost, allowing natural place imagery to shine.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

typography.rules: Never use generic sans (Inter/Roboto) for headings. Headings must have an elegant editorial feel. Overlines must have wide letter spacing to establish scale.

color_palette.rules: No pure #000000 or #808080. All grays must be tinted with warm stone/sand hues (Tailwind Stone palette). Primary (Deep Forest Green) used for key buttons and trust badges. Secondary (Terracotta) for hover states or special callouts.

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-12, p-16, p-24 for main sections. Allow elements to breathe.

grid_system.mode: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Tour Categories
grid_system.items: Asymmetrical spans. Large items span 8 cols, secondary span 4. Mix vertical and horizontal rectangles.

spacing_and_layout.container_rules: Max width 7xl (max-w-7xl). Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px subtle white/20 border-b. Ensures nav text is readable when scrolling over hero.
surface_strategies.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius), flat solid backgrounds for content areas, 1px stone-200 borders. Soft ambient shadow on hover (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)]).
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Max bg-black/30 or gradient overlay (from-black/60 to-transparent). The 3D background or image must remain clearly visible and vibrant.
surface_strategies.story_section: Use the story_texture_bg with background-size cover, adding a subtle noise overlay to give an editorial, high-end print feel.

forms.strategy: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Customize inputs with background stone-50, border-stone-200, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. Labels must be clean and left-aligned.

carousel.strategy: Shadcn Carousel or Embla. Full-bleed images with bottom gradient overlays so text overlay remains readable. Rounded corners (8px) for cards within the carousel.

accordion.strategy: Shadcn Accordion for Day-by-Day itineraries. Clean 1px bottom border per item, elegant typography for day titles.

icons.style: Duotone weight for marketing pages and trust indicators.

hero_3d.concept: A 3D hero with a toggle between 'Spiritual Trails' (Mode 1) and 'Adventure/Wildlife' (Mode 2). Mode 1 uses soft volumetric clouds and golden lighting. Mode 2 uses topographic terrain with deep green lighting. If 3D implementation is too complex, fallback to the high-res generated abstract background images.

animations.hover: Smooth scale up (scale-105) for images inside overflow-hidden cards. Subtle Y-translation (-translate-y-1) for entire cards on hover.
animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling momentum.

hero_fallback_spiritual.description: Abstract 3D soft volumetric clouds, golden hour lighting.

hero_fallback_adventure.description: Abstract 3D topographic terrain map, forest green and sand colors.

story_texture_bg.description: Natural warm stone and fine sand grain texture for the 35 Years Story section.

tour_category_spiritual.description: Indian temple with vibrant colors for Ashtavinayak / Spiritual trails.

tour_category_wildlife.description: Bengal tiger walking on dirt path for Tadoba Safari / Wildlife tours.

tour_category_heritage.description: Rajasthan fort architecture for Heritage Trails.

tour_category_international.description: Dubai skyline for International Shopping / Dubai packages.

carousel_asia_2.description: Bali rice terraces for Explore Asia.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use text shadows or dark gradients when overlaying text on images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, form inputs, and accordions MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='lead-form-submit'`).

special_features.whatsapp_cta: Floating fixed button at bottom-right. Subtle design using #25D366 or brand primary color.
special_features.sticky_quote: A sticky bottom-left prompt or top bar for 'Request Custom Pune-Departure Quote'.
special_features.promotional_banner: A top edge banner for '10% Off' with soft terracotta background and inverse text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) color palette. Avoid default SaaS blues or clinical whites.
Implement the hero section with a mode toggle. Use react-three-fiber for the 3D backgrounds if possible, falling back to the provided high-res generated images.
Use the 'Bento Grid Mode A' for the Tour Categories to create a visually interesting, magazine-like layout.
Do not use generic HTML form elements; use Shadcn components properly styled to match the theme.
Embed the media URLs exactly as provided. DO NOT use placeholder image services.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
